message:
✨ Add local search to remaining cards & fix TypeScript errors

Add local search to:
- GPUWorkloads, GPUInventory
- PVCStatus
- ChartVersions, HelmHistory, HelmValuesDiff
- OperatorStatus, OperatorSubscriptions
- KustomizationStatus, GitOpsDrift

Fix TypeScript build errors:
- useDataCache: Use ReturnType<typeof setInterval> instead of NodeJS.Timeout
- useLocalClusterFilter: Fix type assertion via unknown
- useFeatureRequests: Add missing NotificationType values
- Remove unused imports in GitOps, Network, Storage components
- Mark unused variables with underscore prefix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
